name: Potion of Healing
description: Regain 2d4+2 hit points when consumed.

name: Cloak of Protection
description: +1 bonus to AC and to all saving throws.

name: Bag of Holding
description: Extradimensional storage; 500 lb / 64 cubic ft capacity.

name: +1 Longsword
description: Magical longsword with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
description: A scroll inscribed with a cantrip; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)
description: A scroll inscribed with a 1st-level spell; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell Scroll (2nd Level)
description: A scroll inscribed with a 2nd-level spell; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell Scroll (3rd Level)
description: A scroll inscribed with a 3rd-level spell; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell Scroll (4th Level)
description: A scroll inscribed with a 4th-level spell; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell Scroll (5th Level)
description: A scroll inscribed with a 5th-level spell; cast it once without expending a spell slot.

name: Bead of Nourishment
description: A bead that, when swallowed, provides a full day of food and water.

name: Bead of Refreshment
description: Dissolves in liquid to purify and flavor it like fresh spring water.

name: Boots of False Tracks
description: Leave humanoid tracks of a kind you choose instead of your own.

name: Candle of the Deep
description: A candle whose flame is not extinguished underwater.

name: Cast-Off Armor
description: Armor that can be doffed as an action using its command word.

name: Charlatan's Die
description: A loaded die you can will to come up on any face you choose.

name: Cloak of Billowing
description: Billows dramatically on command for flair and distraction.

name: Cloak of Many Fashions
description: Changes color, style, and apparent material on command.

name: Clockwork Amulet
description: Once per day, replace an attack roll with a 10.

name: Clothes of Mending
description: Magically repair themselves of minor damage each day.

name: Dark Shard Amulet
description: A warlock may use it as a spellcasting focus and regain a warlock cantrip on a DC 10 check.

name: Dread Helm
description: A fearsome helm that makes the wearer's eyes glow red.

name: Ear Horn of Hearing
description: Negates the deafened condition while held to your ear.

name: Enduring Spellbook
description: A spellbook that never deteriorates from age, water, or fire.

name: Ersatz Eye
description: A replacement eye that lets you see normally on that side.

name: Finder's Goggles
description: Advantage on Perception checks to find small lost objects.

name: Hat of Vermin
description: Three times per day, produce a harmless tiny vermin from the hat.

name: Hat of Wizardry
description: A wizard can use it as a spellcasting focus and recover a wizard cantrip.

name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch
description: Produces any mundane spice called for by name.

name: Horn of Silent Alarm
description: Sends a silent alert to creatures of your choice within 600 feet.

name: Imbued Wood Focus
description: A druid's wooden focus that grants a minor elemental flourish.

name: Instrument of Illusions
description: While playing, create illusory visuals within 30 feet.

name: Instrument of Scribing
description: Inscribe messages onto surfaces as you play.

name: Lock of Trickery
description: Appears ordinary but resists lockpicking (DC 15 to pick).

name: Moon-Touched Sword
description: Sheds bright moonlight in a 15-foot radius while drawn.

name: Mystery Key
description: Has a 5% chance of unlocking any nonmagical lock it tries.

name: Orb of Direction
description: Points toward true north on command while held.

name: Orb of Time
description: Tells the current time of day with perfect accuracy.

name: Perfume of Bewitching
description: One application grants advantage on Charisma checks for 1 hour.

name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
description: Exhale smoke that shapes into monstrous forms.

name: Pole of Angling
description: A 10-foot pole that transforms into a fishing rod on command.

name: Pole of Collapsing
description: A 10-foot pole that collapses to 1 foot or extends on command.

name: Pot of Awakening
description: Over 30 days, awakens a plant within into an Awakened Shrub.

name: Potion of Climbing
description: Gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour.

name: Prosthetic Limb
description: Functions as a natural limb of the wearer.

name: Rope of Mending
description: Cut pieces of this rope can be magically rejoined.

name: Ruby of the War Mage
description: Affixed to a weapon, lets you use it as a spellcasting focus.

name: Shield of Expression
description: Its face shows an emotional expression you choose.

name: Smoldering Armor
description: Wisps of smoke constantly rise from this armor, harmless to the wearer.

name: Staff of Adornment
description: Up to three objects can float above the staff's tip.

name: Staff of Birdcalls
description: Emits bird calls from a list of common birds.

name: Staff of Flowers
description: Produce harmless living flowers from the staff's tip.

name: Talking Doll
description: Records and speaks short phrases on command.

name: Tankard of Sobriety
description: Alcohol drunk from it never causes intoxication.

name: Unbreakable Arrow
description: An arrow that cannot be broken by nonmagical means.

name: Veteran's Cane
description: Transforms into a +1 longsword as a bonus action.

name: Walloping Ammunition
description: On a hit, target must save or be knocked prone.

name: Wand of Conducting
description: Generates musical notes as you gesture.

name: Wand of Pyrotechnics
description: Produces harmless sparks and bursts of color.

name: Wand of Secrets
description: Detects hidden doors and traps within 30 feet twice per day.

name: Wand of Smiles
description: Causes the target to smile uncontrollably for 1 minute on a failed save.

name: Alchemy Jug
description: Produces various liquids, from water and wine to acid and oil.

name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
description: The wearer cannot be targeted by divination magic or perceived through scrying.

name: Bag of Tricks (Gray)
description: Pull out a fuzzy ball that becomes a random beast to serve you.

name: Bag of Tricks (Rust)
description: Pull out a fuzzy ball that becomes a random beast to serve you.

name: Bag of Tricks (Tan)
description: Pull out a fuzzy ball that becomes a random beast to serve you.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
description: Your steps make no sound, and you have advantage on Stealth checks.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
description: Walking speed becomes 30 ft. regardless of encumbrance, and you jump three times as far.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
description: Resistance to cold damage; ignore difficult terrain from snow or ice.

name: Bracers of Archery
description: Proficiency with longbow and shortbow; +2 damage with those weapons.

name: Brooch of Shielding
description: Resistance to force damage and immunity to Magic Missile.

name: Broom of Flying
description: A broom that can fly, carrying up to 400 lbs.

name: Cap of Water Breathing
description: Allows the wearer to breathe underwater while submerged.

name: Chime of Opening
description: Opens a nonmagical lock, latch, or door (10 charges).

name: Circlet of Blasting
description: Cast Scorching Ray once per day as a 2nd-level spell.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: Advantage on Stealth checks and disadvantage on Perception checks made to see you.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
description: Breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed of 60 feet.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
description: Pours forth streams or geysers of fresh or salt water on command.

name: Deck of Illusions
description: Draw a card to conjure an illusory creature until dismissed.

name: Driftglobe
description: Casts Light or Daylight on command; can hover and follow you.

name: Dust of Disappearance
description: Sprinkled on creatures, it makes them and their gear invisible for 2d4 minutes.

name: Dust of Dryness
description: Turns water into pellets; crush a pellet to release the water.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
description: When thrown, it causes creatures to sneeze uncontrollably on a failed save.

name: Efficient Quiver
description: Holds arrows, bolts, and larger objects like bows and spears.

name: Elemental Gem
description: Shattered to summon an elemental of the matching type.

name: Elven Chain
description: Chain shirt that counts as light armor for you; proficiency if unproficient.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
description: Uncorked to pour forth a thick cloud of smoke that heavily obscures.

name: Eyes of Charming
description: Cast Charm Person as an action, three charges per day.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
description: Advantage on Investigation checks made to examine small details.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
description: Advantage on Perception checks relying on sight.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)
description: Transforms into a silver raven that follows your mental commands.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: Your Strength score becomes 19 while wearing them.

name: Gem of Brightness
description: Emits bright light or blinds a creature on command (50 charges).

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
description: As a reaction, reduce ranged weapon damage and possibly catch the projectile.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
description: Climbing and swimming do not cost extra movement; advantage on Athletics for those tasks.

name: Gloves of Thievery
description: +5 bonus to Sleight of Hand and lockpicking with Thieves' Tools.

name: Goggles of Night
description: Grant darkvision out to 60 feet.

name: Hat of Disguise
description: Casts Disguise Self at will while worn.

name: Headband of Intellect
description: Your Intelligence score becomes 19 while wearing it.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
description: Cast Comprehend Languages at will while wearing it.

name: Helm of Telepathy
description: Cast Detect Thoughts and Suggestion via the helm's charges.

name: Horn of Blasting
description: Blast a 30-foot cone of thunder damage; risk destruction on natural 1.

name: Immovable Rod
description: Press the button to fix the rod in place in midair until released.

name: Javelin of Lightning
description: When thrown, becomes a 120-foot bolt of lightning dealing 4d6 damage.

name: Keoghtom's Ointment
description: Apply a dose to heal 2d8+2 HP and cure poisons or diseases.

name: Lantern of Revealing
description: Invisible creatures and objects are visible within its bright light.

name: Mariner's Armor
description: Swim speed equal to walking speed; cannot sink while wearing it.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
description: Cast Detect Thoughts three times per day.

name: Mithral Armor
description: No Stealth disadvantage and no Strength prerequisite for this medium or heavy armor.

name: Necklace of Adaptation
description: Breathe normally in any environment and resistance to harmful gases.

name: Pearl of Power
description: Recover one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower once per day.

name: Periapt of Health
description: You are immune to contracting disease while wearing it.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
description: Stabilize automatically when dying; double HP regained from Hit Dice.

name: Pipes of Haunting
description: Play eerie music that can frighten creatures within 30 feet.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
description: Summon and command swarms of rats while playing.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
description: Cast Animal Friendship (save DC 13) for 1 hour after drinking.

name: Potion of Fire Breath
description: Exhale fire dealing 4d6 damage in a 30-foot line for up to 1 hour.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
description: Your Strength becomes 21 for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
description: Regain 4d4+4 hit points when consumed.

name: Potion of Growth
description: Grow one size larger for up to 1 hour with advantage on Strength checks.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
description: Cast Detect Thoughts for the duration after drinking.

name: Potion of Poison
description: Appears to be another potion but poisons the drinker for 3d6 damage.

name: Potion of Resistance
description: Gain resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
description: Breathe underwater for 1 hour after drinking.

name: Quaal's Feather Token
description: A small feather that produces a single magical effect when used.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
description: Three compartments that hold far more than their size suggests.

name: Ring of Jumping
description: Cast Jump as a bonus action; only yourself.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
description: Immune to Detect Thoughts, Suggestion, and alignment detection.

name: Ring of Swimming
description: Gain a swimming speed of 40 feet while wearing it.

name: Ring of Warmth
description: Resistance to cold damage; comfortable in temperatures as low as -50 F.

name: Ring of Water Walking
description: Walk across any liquid surface as if solid ground.

name: Robe of Useful Items
description: Patches that become useful items like daggers, ponies, and doors.

name: Rope of Climbing
description: A 60-foot rope that obeys verbal commands to climb and knot.

name: Saddle of the Cavalier
description: Cannot be dismounted against your will and advantage vs. being unseated.

name: Scroll of Protection
description: Creates a 5-minute ward that excludes creatures of one type.

name: Sending Stones
description: A pair of stones that let you cast Sending to the other stone's holder.

name: Sentinel Shield
description: Advantage on initiative rolls and Perception checks.

name: +1 Shield
description: Grants a +1 bonus to AC beyond a normal shield.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
description: Climb walls and ceilings with your hands free.

name: Stone of Good Luck
description: +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

name: Sword of Vengeance
description: +1 weapon that compels the wielder toward vengeful behavior.

name: Trident of Fish Command
description: Cast Dominate Beast on fish and swimming creatures (3 charges).

name: Wand of Magic Detection
description: Cast Detect Magic three times per day.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
description: Cast Magic Missile at any level using its charges (7 charges).

name: Wand of the War Mage +1
description: +1 to spell attack rolls; ignore half cover.

name: Wand of Web
description: Cast Web from the wand using its charges.

name: +1 Dagger
description: Magical dagger with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Shortsword
description: Magical shortsword with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Rapier
description: Magical rapier with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Scimitar
description: Magical scimitar with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Greatsword
description: Magical greatsword with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Battleaxe
description: Magical battleaxe with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Warhammer
description: Magical warhammer with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Mace
description: Magical mace with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Quarterstaff
description: Magical quarterstaff with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Shortbow
description: Magical shortbow with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Longbow
description: Magical longbow with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Light Crossbow
description: Magical light crossbow with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +1 Heavy Crossbow
description: Magical heavy crossbow with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Winged Boots
description: Gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for up to 4 hours per day.

name: Adamantine Armor
description: Critical hits against the wearer become normal hits.

name: Ammunition +2 (Arrows)
description: Magical arrows with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Ammunition +2 (Bolts)
description: Magical crossbow bolts with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Amulet of Health
description: Your Constitution score becomes 19 while wearing it.

name: Armor of Resistance (Fire)
description: You have resistance to fire damage while wearing this armor.

name: Armor of Resistance (Cold)
description: You have resistance to cold damage while wearing this armor.

name: Armor of Resistance (Lightning)
description: You have resistance to lightning damage while wearing this armor.

name: Bag of Beans
description: Plant a bean to produce a random magical effect.

name: Bag of Devouring
description: Resembles a Bag of Holding but devours things placed inside.

name: Berserker Axe
description: +1 battleaxe that grants bonus HP but can induce a rage curse.

name: Boots of Levitation
description: Cast Levitate on yourself at will.

name: Boots of Speed
description: Double your walking speed and grant disadvantage on opportunity attacks.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
description: Summon and command a water elemental once per day.

name: Bracers of Defense
description: +2 bonus to AC while unarmored and not using a shield.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
description: Summon and command a fire elemental once per day.

name: Carpet of Flying
description: A flying carpet that carries riders at 40 feet per round.

name: Cauldron of Plenty
description: Produces simmering soup enough to feed many people daily.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
description: Summon and command an air elemental once per day.

name: Chime of Resounding
description: Rings loud enough to daze creatures within 60 feet on a failed save.

name: Circlet of Human Perfection
description: Transform into an idealized human form while worn.

name: Cloak of Displacement
description: Attack rolls against you have disadvantage while you wear it.

name: Cloak of the Bat
description: Advantage on Stealth; transform into a bat and fly in dim light.

name: Cube of Force
description: Create a force cube around yourself with various protective faces.

name: Daern's Instant Fortress
description: A small cube that becomes a 20-foot fortified tower on command.

name: Dagger of Venom
description: +1 dagger that can coat itself in venom for extra poison damage once per day.

name: Dimensional Shackles
description: Manacles that prevent teleportation and planar travel while worn.

name: Dwarven Plate
description: +2 bonus to AC; dwarven-forged plate armor.

name: Dwarven Thrower
description: +3 warhammer (dwarves only) that returns when thrown; bonus damage to giants.

name: Flame Tongue
description: Magic sword that ignites on command to deal an extra 2d6 fire damage.

name: Folding Boat
description: A small box that unfolds into a 10-ft or 24-ft boat on command.

name: Gem of Seeing
description: Look through the gem to see invisible creatures and through illusions.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
description: +1 studded leather that can change appearance to any outfit.

name: Helm of Teleportation
description: Cast Teleport from the helm using its charges.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Silver)
description: Summons 2d4+2 berserkers once per week to fight for you.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Brass)
description: Summons 3d4+3 berserkers once per week to fight for you.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
description: A mount's walking speed is increased by 30 feet while shod.

name: Iron Bands of Binding
description: Throw to restrain a Huge-or-smaller creature in iron bands.

name: Mace of Disruption
description: Extra 2d6 radiant damage vs. undead and fiends; may destroy them outright.

name: Mace of Smiting
description: +1 mace (+3 vs. constructs); bonus damage on critical hits to constructs.

name: Mace of Terror
description: Expend a charge to frighten creatures within 30 feet for 1 minute.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
description: You have advantage on saving throws against spells.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
description: Traps creatures that fail a save when they look into it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
description: Detach beads and throw them to explode as fireballs.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
description: Beads that let you cast selected cleric spells as bonus actions.

name: Oathbow
description: Declare a sworn enemy; extra 3d6 damage and advantage against them.

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
description: Immunity to poison damage and the poisoned condition.

name: Portable Hole
description: A 6-foot circle of cloth that opens into an extradimensional hole.

name: Potion of Diminution
description: Drink to become Tiny with disadvantage on Strength rolls for 1d4 hours.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
description: Become gaseous as per the spell for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Heroism
description: 10 temporary HP and blessed by the spell Bless for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Invisibility
description: Turn invisible for up to 1 hour or until you attack or cast a spell.

name: Potion of Superior Healing
description: Regain 8d4+8 hit points when consumed.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
description: Cast Animal Friendship, Fear (on beasts), or Speak with Animals.

name: Ring of Evasion
description: Expend a charge to succeed on a failed Dexterity save.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
description: Cast Feather Fall on yourself when you fall.

name: Ring of Free Action
description: Difficult terrain and paralysis/restraint do not affect you.

name: Ring of Protection
description: +1 bonus to AC and to all saving throws.

name: Ring of Resistance
description: Resistance to one damage type (determined at creation).

name: Ring of Spell Storing
description: Stores up to 5 levels of spells cast into it for later use.

name: Ring of the Ram
description: Blast a target with a spectral ram using charges for damage or shove.

name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
description: See through solid matter for 1 minute (risk of exhaustion).

name: Rope of Entanglement
description: A 30-foot rope that animates to entangle a creature on command.

name: Scimitar of Speed
description: +2 scimitar; make one attack with it as a bonus action each turn.

name: +2 Shield
description: Grants a +2 bonus to AC beyond a normal shield.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
description: Resistance to ranged weapon damage; attracts ranged attacks toward you.

name: Staff of Charming
description: Cast Charm Person, Command, or Comprehend Languages from its charges.

name: Staff of Healing
description: Cast Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Mass Cure Wounds using charges.

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
description: Cast Giant Insect or Insect Plague using the staff's charges.

name: Staff of the Python
description: Throw to transform into a giant constrictor snake obedient to you.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
description: +2 quarterstaff and spellcasting focus that casts nature spells.

name: Staff of Withering
description: +2 quarterstaff; hits drain the target's Strength or Constitution.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
description: Summon and command an earth elemental once per day.

name: Sun Blade
description: Sheathed sunlight forms a +2 longsword blade; extra damage vs. undead.

name: Tentacle Rod
description: Three tentacles lash out on command, reducing the target's speed.

name: Vicious Weapon
description: On a critical hit, deal an extra 7 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Wand of Binding
description: Cast Hold Person or Hold Monster using its charges.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
description: Senses the direction of the nearest hostile creature within 60 feet.

name: Wand of Fear
description: Cast Command (flee) or a cone of fear using charges.

name: Wand of Fireballs
description: Cast Fireball using the wand's charges.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
description: Cast Lightning Bolt using the wand's charges.

name: Wand of Paralysis
description: Release a thin ray that paralyzes a target on a failed save.

name: Wand of the War Mage +2
description: +2 to spell attack rolls; ignore half cover.

name: Wand of Wonder
description: Expend a charge for a random wondrous magical effect.

name: +2 Longsword
description: Magical longsword with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +2 Dagger
description: Magical dagger with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: +2 Shortbow
description: Magical shortbow with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Wings of Flying
description: Grow magical wings that grant a flying speed of 60 ft for up to 1 hour.
